# freeSIEM Sentinel 0.2.0

- Add a signed Pending Tasks queue for sensitive freeSIEM Core user-management actions.
- Add local approve, deny, auto-approve, execution, and audit trail handling in WordPress.
- Add Pending Tasks wp-admin screens and approval policy settings.
- Extend heartbeat payloads with task capability flags, summaries, pending items, and recent updates.
- Add a smoke test script for submission, idempotency, workflow transitions, and heartbeat redaction checks.
